title: Filmmaking
description: This is a modpack designed for making youtube videos a little more cinematic.
body: Filmmaking is a Minecraft modpack built for creators who want to improve the look of their youtube videos. using mods like flashback, axiom, iris, and more, it’s perfect for YouTube content. Craft your stage, direct your shots, and bring your imagination to life in Minecraft like never before. yes this description is mostly ai generated lol
